ops.body: Pivot: capt-hook 9.0.0 (released 2026-07-11) deleted register-hooks/settings-drift; wiring is now plugin-shipped hooks.json. Refit: cc-notes stays a regular packs.toml pack (installed by cc-notes init); SessionEnd dispatch comes from upstream capt-hook hooks.json gaining 'run SessionEnd --async'; once-guard gains async in its claim key; pack SessionStart handlers go async_=True; availability context line moves to a once-per-session UserPromptSubmit nudge; heal_event_wiring deleted.
